intent.description: High-level intent category derived from the request.

repos_hint.description: Literal mentions of repos, services, apps, or codebases in the request. Words only, no inference.

stack_hint.description: Literal mentions of stacks, languages, or frameworks. Words only, no inference.

scope_hint.description: One-line summary of the scope in the user's own framing.

title.description: One discrete deliverable from the request. If the request mentions N artifacts touching N codebases, emit N targets.

kind.description: Free-form short label the user would use (e.g. 'api', 'mobile screen', 'docs', 'migration'). Do NOT force a fixed taxonomy.
